channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'Let them shower in hotels': Johannesburg Premier faces backlash amid water crisis
item.description: In South Africa, as taps run dry in Johannesburg, Africa's richest city, a tone deaf remark by a senior politician there unleashes fury.

item.title: Do the people building the AI chatbot Claude understand what they've created?
item.description: Anthropic is one of the world's most powerful AI firms. New Yorker writer Gideon Lewis-Kraus explains how they're trying to make chatbot Claude more e...

item.title: Trump would like the government he leads to pay him billions
item.description: President Trump is asking the federal government for billions of dollars in damages, putting his own Justice Department on the spot and creating an un...

item.title: Australia bans a citizen with alleged IS links from returning from Syria
item.description: The Australian is among a group of 34 women and children who had planned to fly from Damascus to Australia on Monday but were turned back by Syrian au...

item.title: Russia's hybrid warfare rattles Poland and NATO
item.description: Russia is stepping up covert attacks across Europe — rail sabotage, drones, cyberstrikes — testing NATO. Polish officials warn "disposable agents" are...

item.title: Single-Family vs. Multifamily Rentals: Which Is the Best First Rental?
item.description: Single-family vs. multifamily rental properties—which gets you to financial freedom faster? A rookie real estate investor is wondering what he should ...

item.title: Late-night host Stephen Colbert isn’t backing down from public dispute with CBS bosses
Amazon halts Blue Jay robotics project after less than 6 months
item.description: Amazon said Blue Jay's core tech will be used for other robotics projects and the employees who worked on it were moved to other projects.

item.title: How to Buy Your First (or Next) Rental Property in 2026 (Step by Step)
item.description: Want to buy your first rental property in 2026? You’ve come to the right place! Whether you dream of becoming a “small and mighty” investor or buildin...

item.title: How the Wealthiest Have Programmed Their Portfolios This Year
item.description: Despite stock markets hovering around record highs, investors are feeling jittery. You can see it in consumer confidence collapsing to its lowest leve...

item.title: Jesse Jackson’s 1988 presidential run inspired generations to carry his message
Data breach at fintech giant Figure affects close to a million customers
item.description: The Figure data breach allowed hackers to steal customer names, dates of birth, physical addresses, phone numbers, and email addresses.

item.title: The children of late civil rights leader Jesse Jackson honor his legacy a day after his death
item.description: Jesse Jackson’s children remember his civil rights legacy and describe him as a devoted father after his death at home.

item.title: SeatGeek and Spotify team up to offer concert ticket sales inside the music platform
item.description: SeatGeek announced on Wednesday a new integration with Spotify, bringing a seamless ticket-buying experience for Spotify users. Now, when Spotify user...

item.title: Mastodon, a decentralized alternative to X, plans to target creators with new features
item.description: Mastodon is looking to grow its open source, decentralized social network with new features aimed at creators.

item.title: A startup called Germ becomes the first private messenger that launches directly from Bluesky’s app
item.description: Social network Bluesky now offers private messaging by integrating the startup Germ's E2E encrypted messenger natively in its app.

item.title: The Housing For the 21st Century Act Brings Game Changers For Multifamily Investors
item.description: There’s nothing that unifies opposing political factions faster than seeing homeless encampments in American cities. That’s why the Housing for the 21...

item.title: How to Buy Five Short-Term Rentals in Five Years
item.description: Everyone hears “five Airbnbs in five years” and immediately pictures some kind of motivational speaker montage. You know the one: And then year two hi...
